case_title: THE HERTZ CORPORATION VS. NADINE GRAYS et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-10-2015 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT JUDGMENT. THE NOV-26-2014 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR FEB-10-2015 CONTINUED TO MAY-12-2015 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AS TO FIRST AMENDED COMPLAINT. THE FEB-10-2015 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
